headline: Chubb Leadership Moves And Dividend Streak Underpin Valuation And Growth Story
summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) has appointed Richard Bracken as head of Strategic Partnership Development for APAC, Japan and International Digital. The company has named Brent MacLean as Division President of ESIS Inc. Chubb's Board has recommended a 33rd consecutive annual increase in the quarterly dividend. Chubb, trading at $332.46, sits in a part of the market where consistent execution and leadership stability matter a lot to investors. The stock is up 7.2% year to date and 17.7% over the past year,...

headline: Greg Abel Is Now Running Berkshire. Here Are the 3 Moves That Will Define His Era
summary: Greg Abel officially took the helm at Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-B) on January 1, 2026, inheriting a fortress balance sheet, a legendary reputation, and a cash pile that would make most sovereign wealth funds blush. The first two months of his tenure have been anything but quiet. Three moves are already shaping what the Abel era ... Greg Abel Is Now Running Berkshire. Here Are the 3 Moves That Will Define His Era
